headline: BofA Raises its Price Target on CSX Corporation (CSX)
summary: CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) is one of the 10 All-Time High Stocks with Legs to Rally Further. On June 17, 2026, BofA analyst Ken Hoexter raised the firm’s price target on CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) to $53 from $51 and maintained a Buy rating. Hoexter raised Q2, 2026, and 2027 EPS estimates by 3%, 2%, and 2%, […]
